name: Buckwheat Applesauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the ingredients in the order given into the bread pan, select WHITE bread, and push Start.
2. Serve with fruit and cheese for a light lunch.
Note: This hearty bread has a coarse crumb and slightly sweet flavor. It's wonderful toasted, perfect for a filling breakfast. Serve with fruit and cheese for a refreshing lunch. Makes 1 loaf, 8 slices. Each slice contains 125 calories; less than 1 gm dietary fiber; less than 1 gm soluble fiber; 23 gm carbohydrates; 3 gm protein; 2 gm fat (14% of calories from fat); 0 mg cholesterol; 245 mg sodium; 56 potassium; 5 mg calcium.
